---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Nathan Seto"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(recipes)
  library(readr)       
    library(dplyr)       
      library(caret)       
        library(ggplot2)
          library(parsnip)
            library(purrr)
              library(discrim)
                library(tidyr)
                  library(lda)
                    library(VIM)
                      library(MASS)

train = read_csv("train.csv")


colnames(train) = 1:82

x = (train[1:25,2:10]) %>% knitr::kable()
```

\newpage
```{r}
x
```
